tiles.title: Events by Severity
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(severity_text, p_log_category, 'unknown') AS severity, COUNT(*) AS records FROM $logs_dataset GROUP BY severity ORDER BY records DESC

tiles.title: Events by Category
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(p_log_category, 'unknown') AS category, COUNT(*) AS records FROM $logs_dataset GROUP BY category ORDER BY records DESC

tiles.title: Events by Host
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("host.name", 'unknown') AS host_name, COUNT(*) AS records FROM $logs_dataset GROUP BY host_name ORDER BY records DESC LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Error and Warning Events
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM $logs_dataset WHERE severity_text IN ('ERROR','WARN','WARNING') OR p_log_category IN ('ERROR','WARN','WARNING')

tiles.title: Event Trend
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT date_bin(INTERVAL '1 minute', p_timestamp, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01T00:00:00') AS time_bucket, COUNT(*) AS value FROM $logs_dataset GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket

tiles.title: Recent Windows Events
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT p_timestamp, COALESCE(severity_text, p_log_category, 'unknown') AS severity, COALESCE("host.name", 'unknown') AS host_name, body FROM $logs_dataset ORDER BY p_timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

tiles.title: Spans by Status
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(span_status_description, 'unknown') AS status, COUNT(*) AS spans FROM $traces_dataset GROUP BY status ORDER BY spans DESC

tiles.title: Spans by Name
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(span_name, 'unknown') AS span_name, COUNT(*) AS spans FROM $traces_dataset GROUP BY span_name ORDER BY spans DESC LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Workload CPU Iterations
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT approx_percentile_cont(CAST(COALESCE("workload.cpu_iterations", '0') AS DOUBLE), 0.95) AS value FROM $traces_dataset

tiles.title: Workload Latency Trend
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT date_bin(INTERVAL '1 minute', p_timestamp, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01T00:00:00') AS time_bucket, approx_percentile_cont(span_duration_ns, 0.95)/1000000 AS value FROM $traces_dataset GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket

tiles.title: Recent Workload Spans
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT p_timestamp, span_trace_id, span_name, span_status_description, span_duration_ns/1000000 AS duration_ms FROM $traces_dataset ORDER BY p_timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

tiles.title: Metric Families by Prefix
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT CASE WHEN metric_name LIKE 'windows_%' THEN 'windows_exporter' WHEN metric_name LIKE 'go_%' THEN 'go' WHEN metric_name LIKE 'process_%' THEN 'process' ELSE 'other' END AS prefix, COUNT(DISTINCT metric_name) AS families FROM $metrics_dataset GROUP BY prefix ORDER BY families DESC

tiles.title: Host Inventory
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT DISTINCT COALESCE("host.name", 'unknown') AS host_name, COALESCE("service.instance.id", 'unknown') AS instance, COALESCE("host.type", 'unknown') AS host_type, COALESCE("cloud.provider", 'unknown') AS cloud_provider, COALESCE("cloud.region", 'unknown') AS cloud_region FROM $metrics_dataset ORDER BY host_name LIMIT 100
